title: Provide Feedback While Approving Plan

findings.description: No feedback mechanism during plan approval visible. A 'Start feedback mode' button exists in the interactive elements (found via accessibility tree) but this appears to be a general app feedback tool, not a plan-approval feedback mechanism.
findings.expected: A way to provide inline feedback or modifications while approving an execution plan.
findings.actual: No plan approval feedback UI. 'Start feedback mode' button exists but is a general app feedback tool.
findings.blocked_by: Requires active conversation with plan approval flow

verdict: Feature not implemented. General feedback button exists but no plan-specific feedback mechanism.
